name: AutoAnimeBot
description: Upload Ongoing Animes In Negligible Size... Automatically

BOT_TOKEN.description: Make a bot from @BotFather, and enter it's api token here.

OWNER.description: Get ur Id Of Telegram nd Paste Here.

FIREBASE_URL.description: Firebase endpoint URL, from Firebase Realtime Database

FIREBASE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_FILE.description: Firebase Service Account File Link, from Firebase Realtime Database

BACKUP_CHANNEL.description: If You Want Button Upload On Main Channel Don't Forget To Add Backup Channel becoz anime will be save in backup channel

LOG_CHANNEL.description: Channel ID Where You Can Check Status Of Tasks.

CLOUD_CHANNEL.description: Channel ID Where Bot Will Upload Samples And Screen Shots.
